articles.title: Market Jitters: U.S.-Iran Tensions Rattle European Shares
articles.description: European share markets opened lower after Tehran closed the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating tensions with the United States. The pan-European STOXX 600 index registered a minor decline as energy stocks climbed owing to a spike in oil prices. Investors await earnings season for more economic insights.

articles.title: Asian currencies weaken on renewed Gulf conflict, KOSPI tumbles 8%
articles.description: ASIAN currencies weakened against the U.S. dollar on Monday as renewed tension in the Middle East sent oil prices surging and revived fears of inflation, while South Korean shares fell 8% to trigger a circuit breaker, led lower by SK Hynix.

articles.title: Stock Markets Slump in Early Trade on Rising Tensions in West Asia, Higher Oil Prices
articles.description: Stock Markets Slump in Early Trade on Rising Tensions in West Asia, Higher Oil Prices

articles.title: Iran escalates attacks on US bases in Gulf states, warns of more 'incidents' in strait
articles.description: WASHINGTON/DUBAI, July 13 - U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged heavy missile and drone assaults, with Tehran targeting U.S. facilities in states across the Gulf and saying it had again closed the vital Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices higher. Read more at straitstimes.com.

articles.title: Iran widens attacks on US bases in Gulf, Hormuz tensions lift oil prices
articles.description: Iran's Guards say they targeted US facilities in Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman and Jordan.

articles.title: Petrol and diesel prices fall in July, EV tariffs updated
articles.description: AA Ireland's fuel price analysis shows that both petrol and diesel prices decreased in July compared to June

articles.title: Gold falls 1% on MCX, silver crashes by Rs 5.3k per kg amid renewed US-Iran war tensions
articles.description: Rising crude oil prices fueled concerns that inflationary pressures could persist, reinforcing expectations that the Federal Reserve may raise interest rates once more this year.

articles.title: U.S. hits Iran as Gulf states targeted in flare-up over Hormuz
articles.description: U.S. strikes on Iran escalate tensions over the Strait of Hormuz, impacting Gulf allies and oil prices amid ongoing conflict.

articles.title: Rupee hits one-month low as renewed Mideast conflict lifts oil prices
articles.description: The Indian rupee reached its weakest point in over a month on Monday. Renewed Middle East hostilities and Iran's Strait of Hormuz claim sent oil prices surging. State-run banks offered dollars, likely on behalf of the Reserve Bank of India. Markets had anticipated less severe escalation, but this risk is now back. India's upcoming trade and inflation data will offer further economic insights.
